---
title: "Get Started"
---

```{python}
import polars as pl
import plotnine_polars

url = "https://cdn.rawgit.com/kjhealy/dvdata/main/organs.csv"
organs = pl.read_csv(url)
```

```{python}
gapminder = pl.read_csv(
    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jennybc/gapminder/main/inst/extdata/gapminder.tsv",
    separator="\t"
)
gapminder
```


```{python}
#| label: fig-first-plot
#| fig-cap: "Life expectancy plotted against GDP per capita for a large number of country-years."
(
    gapminder
    .ggplot()
    .aes(x = "gdpPercap", y = "lifeExp")
    .geom_point()
)
```
